/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AuFilDeLaVie.dir/main.cpp.o -o AuFilDeLaVie  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL _deps/raylib-build/raylib/external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework CoreFoundation
